overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian city at dawn. The character proceeds from a stone-paved street through a monumental archway into a wide ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street approaching main gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone-paved street toward the monumental archway

entered.detail: large stone archway with dual arches forming the main city entrance
ancient stone building with decorative reliefs and weathered facade
stone structure with wooden awning and market stalls
large stone planter with red flowering plants
tall narrow evergreen tree near the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a stone-paved street flanked by ancient buildings, approaching a large monumental archway in the distance. The scene is quiet with few pedestrians visible, and the warm dawn light casts long shadows across the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: city gate passage with camel traffic

events.description: camels with riders enter from the right and cross the path ahead
character walks through the main stone archway into the open avenue beyond

agents.ego_description: navigating through the gate as camels pass by, moving from the enclosed street into the open area

notable_agents.action: camel with rider moving from right to left across the stone path
pedestrian walking toward the camera through the archway

entered.detail: large recumbent sphinx statue on stone pedestal becoming visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: Camels with riders cross the path from right to left as the character approaches the main city gate. The character passes through the archway, transitioning from the enclosed street to a more open area where sphinx statues become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues

events.description: full view of the avenue opens up with rows of sphinx statues on both sides

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the grand ceremonial avenue toward the distant triumphal arch

notable_agents.action: lone pedestrian walking ahead toward the distant monument

entered.detail: large archway monument visible at the end of the ceremonial avenue
recumbent sphinx statue on stone pedestal lining the right side of the avenue
tall trees lining both sides of the wide avenue

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide ceremonial avenue lined with large sphinx statues on stone pedestals. The avenue stretches toward a distant triumphal arch, with trees lining both sides and a lone pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, enclosed city street into a grand, open ceremonial avenue at dawn. It begins by following a character down a stone-paved road flanked by ancient buildings, where warm morning light casts long shadows across the cobblestones. As the character approaches a monumental archway, camels with riders cross the path, leading the camera through the gate and away from the narrow street. The scene then expands into a wide thoroughfare lined with imposing sphinx statues on stone pedestals and flanking trees. Finally, the view opens further to reveal a distant triumphal arch as the character follows a lone pedestrian down the center of the avenue.
